CarbonEmissionMetric.description: Represents a carbon emission metric and its measured value.

value.description: Measured value of the emission metric.

CostComponent.description: Represents an individual cost component and its value.

value.description: Cost value associated with the component.

CostComponentCategory.description: Represents the category of a cost component.

CostComponentDetails.description: Represents a breakdown of a cost component (total, capex, opex).

totalCost.description: Gets or sets the total cost.

capexCost.description: Gets or sets the capital expenditure (CapEx) cost.

opexCost.description: Gets or sets the operational expenditure (OpEx) cost.

costLineItems.description: Gets or sets the list of cost line items.

CostComponentType.description: Represents the type of cost component.

storageCost.description: Gets or sets the storage cost.

computeCost.description: Gets or sets the compute cost.

itLaborCost.description: Gets or sets the IT labor cost.

networkCost.description: Gets or sets the network cost.

securityCost.description: Gets or sets the security cost (scalar). Deprecated: Use securityCostDetails instead.

managementCost.description: Gets or sets the management cost.

facilitiesCost.description: Gets or sets the facilities cost.

licenseCostDetails.description: Gets or sets the license cost details (legacy format). Deprecated: Use licensingCost instead.

licensingCost.description: Gets or sets the licensing cost.

CostLineItem.description: Represents a single line item in a cost breakdown.

pillar.description: Gets or sets the pillar this cost belongs to.

name.description: Gets or sets the name of the cost component.

value.description: Gets or sets the value of the cost component.

costType.description: Gets or sets the type of cost (Capex or Opex).

CostOverride.description: A cost override entry that allows the customer to specify a custom value for a specific on-premises cost category.

name.description: The on-premises cost category to override.

value.description: The override value for the cost category.

CostPillar.description: Represents the cost pillar a line item belongs to.

publicNetworkAccess.description:
This value can be set to 'enabled' to avoid breaking changes on existing
customer resources and templates. If set to 'disabled', traffic over public
interface is not allowed, and private endpoint connections would be the
exclusive access method.

The ARM id of the storage account used for interactions when public access is
disabled.
